description_long: This is a rectangular, bi-fold wallet crafted from brown leather with a smooth, slightly textured finish. The front side features a stitched border and a prominent black signature-style logo in the lower right corner, adding a touch of designer flair. The back side is plain, showcasing the uniform brown leather surface without any visible branding or embellishments. The wallet appears slim and compact, suitable for carrying in a pocket or small bag. The edges are neatly finished, and the top edge has a slightly different shade, possibly indicating a layered or reinforced section. No visible closure mechanism, attachments, or signs of wear are present.
description: A slim, brown leather wallet with a signature logo on the front and a plain back, featuring a smooth, slightly textured finish.
description_view_0: A thin side profile of the wallet, showing its slimness and the even brown color along the edge.
description_view_1: The front view displays the brown leather surface with a stitched border and a black signature-style logo in the lower right corner.
description_view_2: Another thin side profile, similar to view 0, emphasizing the wallet's slim construction.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a plain brown leather surface with no visible logos, patterns, or embellishments.
attribute_brand_logo: A black, signature-style logo is present on the lower right corner of the front side. The logo appears handwritten but no recognizable brand name is clearly indicated.
attribute_decorative_pattern: The front side features a stitched border and a black signature-style logo; otherwise, the wallet is plain with no additional decorative pattern.
